controls: Only the four already-consumed O1C-0018 BUILD FAPs are admissible; DEVELOPMENT pools, new targets, solvers and sibling repositories are forbidden.
All five public feature tensors and their commitments persist before the deterministic BUILD label oracle is first invoked.
Each no-intercept scalar reader learns its training RMS and coefficient from exactly the other three episodes; its own heldout feature and label never enter that fit.

Cumulative replacement tests the telescoping ungated observation, legacy reintegration tests repeated cumulative counting, a fixed derangement moves only the even confidence flags, and common mode is polarity even.
All twenty fit receipts and all 5120 heldout logits persist before NLL, local ranks or global top-65536 diagnostics are computed.

The strong gate is frozen before outcomes and requires four positive folds, four primary-over-cumulative fold wins, the two minimum mean margins and primary mean wins over all three remaining controls.
This consumed-BUILD result is RETROSPECTIVE_MECHANISM only; it cannot authorize a fresh target, mutate O1C-0019/O1C-0022 or bypass O1C-0023/O1C-0026/O1C-0029.
hypothesis: Chronological innovations in the assumed coordinate's own proof-ancestry touch carry portable full-round key orientation, and polarity-even one-sided exact-cutoff conflict events amplify that orientation beyond cumulative replacement, legacy cumulative reintegration, deranged confidence and common-mode controls.
next_action: If strong, preserve the diagonal innovation plus exact-frontier confidence sensor for a new O1C packet producer and later compare live O1/O1-O scout-to-focus re-ranking against a frozen one-shot policy after O1C-0019. If null, close only this summarized diagonal-frontier lamp and move to raw antecedent identity or signed interaction pairs without consuming a new target.
prediction: Across four consumed BUILD leave-one-out folds, primary compression is positive in every fold, averages at least 0.25 bit per 256-bit key, beats cumulative replacement in every fold by at least 0.10 mean bit and exceeds every matched control mean under twenty fixed one-scalar fits.
